top_findings.summary: This skill requests full read access to Claude Code session storage files including `agent-*.jsonl` sidechain logs beyond the current session, potentially exposing unrelated agent conversations and detailed interaction histories that go beyond basic debugging needs for the current task. While session history access may be needed for debugging, accessing *all* agent sidechain logs via wildcard pattern (`agent-*.jsonl`) represents excessive system-level access to sensitive conversation data that could belong to other sessions or agents unrelated to the immediate debugging task.
